examples: We all know that people fumble along the way.
Words frustrate her, like fastened buttons at which she can only fumble.
How does this country end up being a Republic, the Third Republic, which has been castigated because it seemed to fumble along?
Henderson's best strike on goal saw goalkeeper Kingson uncomfortably fumble his measured shot around the post.
Others make you fumble through your pockets to find the volume button on the phone.
